meta.title: How America almost put the F-15 on aircraft carriers
meta.description:
Before the F-14 Tomcat earned fame in "Top Gun," the U.S. Navy nearly ended up flying the F-15 off aircraft carriers instead.

📰  Articles Cited
Sea Eagle: America's plan to put the F-15 on aircraft carriers 
➡️ https://sbxx.us/3lmlQ1J
